name: 24/7 Golf USA
about: 24/7 Golf USA is an online retailer specializing in golf simulator hardware and software, particularly focused on the SkyTrak brand. They offer a comprehensive range of products including launch monitors, simulator studio packages, accessories, and training aids. The company provides detailed product information and pricing for various setups, from standard to premium configurations, to help customers build a home golf simulator. Membership options are available to access software features and virtual courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to industry-leading SkyTrak launch monitor technology
Comprehensive packages for home simulator setups
Membership access to a wide variety of virtual golf courses

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with dual doppler radar technology
Camera-based launch monitor, Golf Monthly Editors Choice 2023

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, to use the simulator equipment and software, you will need to provide your own golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: As an online retail store, you would consume your purchases in your own personal space. There is no on-site food or drink service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Play time depends on the software and number of players, but typically 18 holes can be completed in 1-2 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The equipment and software can be used by juniors and youth golfers, as the system is suitable for all skill levels and ages.
